channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Intense bombing in Tehran, Isfahan
item.description: Black smoke is rising over Tehran and Isfahan after early morning US-Israeli airstrikes on the cities.

item.title: Trump says US-Israeli war on Iran creating a new Middle East
item.description: Donald Trump told a Saudi investment conference that the Middle East will soon be free from Iranian “nuclear blackmail.”

item.title: Iran war live: Trump again slams NATO’s lack of support for war on Tehran
item.description: Iranian Red Crescent says more than 92,600 civilian units were damaged across the country in US-Israeli attacks.

item.title: Rescue workers rush to save lives after south Tehran missile strike
item.description: Iranian rescue workers have been pulling survivors and bodies out of a building after a missile strike on south Tehran.

item.title: Houthis warn ‘fingers on the trigger’ as US-Israel war on Iran continues
item.description: The Iran-aligned Yemeni group have the ability to target key shipping lanes around the Arabian Peninsula.

item.title: ‘Fingers on the trigger’ for military intervention, Houthis warn
item.description: The Houthis have warned that they are ready for direct military intervention in the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: What is the TACO trade and are investors profiting amid war on Iran?
item.description: Global energy crisis continues to widen amid market volatility, while so-called 'TACO traders' attempt to capitalise.

item.title: Guns in the streets as US, Israel intensify month-long attacks across Iran
item.description: A senior IRGC official in Tehran told state television that children over 12 can join armed patrols and checkpoints.

item.title: Grieving Iranian mother tells UN about children before school attack
item.description: An Iranian mother told the UN Human Right’s Council about the last time she saw her children alive.

item.title: Israel launches strikes on nuclear sites as Iran warns of retaliation
item.description: Uranium facility, steel plants and heavy water complex among targets hit as IRGC warns of escalation.
